data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description

Add sprint-next-batch.sh to the check-tickets-boundary allowlist (`.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf`) with an inline comment citing epic e1b2-2653.

### Implementation Steps

1. Check whether `.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf` exists (created by story b1de-627f)
2. If the file exists: append the entry
3. If the file does NOT exist: create it with a header comment and the entry
4. Entry format: `plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh  # thin-wrapper: allowed per epic e1b2-2653`

Note: This file is owned by story b1de-627f (check-tickets-boundary.sh hook). If b1de-627f has not yet run, creating the file here is idempotent — b1de-627f will add its own content when it runs.

### File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf | Create or modify |

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf contains sprint-next-batch.sh entry
  Verify: grep -q 'sprint-next-batch.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf
- [ ] Entry includes epic e1b2-2653 citation
  Verify: grep 'sprint-next-batch.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf | grep -q 'e1b2-2653'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
data.title: Register sprint-next-batch.sh in check-tickets-boundary allowlist with epic citation
